description: preview a single TTS request payload from text (dry-run; no audio rendered without OPENAI_API_KEY + network)
rules: runs the bundled CLI in --dry-run (deterministic, offline; no openai package needed)
voice must be a built-in voice; instructions only apply to gpt-4o-mini TTS models
live audio rendering requires OPENAI_API_KEY + network and is performed outside the governed run
usage: Set INPUT_TEXT (verbatim text). Optional: VOICE (default cedar), INSTRUCTIONS (style spec). Output: speak.json.
limitation: Governed run is dry-run only: it materializes the exact request payload, it does not call the API or write audio.
